meta.title: Vivianne dos Santos
meta.description: I live between silence and motion. The paths: Infonte, SyncHim, Escola dos Véus, Sete Véus, Sete Ecos, and Loranne.
meta.ogDescription: Writer, creator, in training in transpersonal psychology, psychology and spirituality, and systemic family constellation therapy. I live between silence and motion, and I help you come back to yourself.

hero.sub: writer and systemic therapist in training
hero.tese: I live between silence and motion. My work begins from a single idea: beneath whatever tightens in you, in love or in life, there is always a knot that comes from before.
hero.teseDestaque: I help you see it, and come back to yourself.

respira: You don't come here to find answers. You come to rediscover your own.

mundos.lead: Choose where you need to enter

infonte.texto: For the woman with too much potential and too little clarity. A path to clear the mind, to be enough on her own, and to turn dreams into action.

synchim.badge: the love that fell out of sync
synchim.texto: Couples don't die from lack of love. They die from being out of sync. A diagnosis to see the knot that's pulling love away from you.

escola.texto: The courses of transformation, where you cross each veil that separates you from who you are.

livro.texto: The 7 Veils of Awakening. The book, and the path it opens.

ecos.texto: The app of the universe. Practice, reading, and the community that forms around it.

loranne.texto: Music for inner silence. Meditation, presence, and the sound of coming home.

sobre.p1: I'm the author of The 7 Veils of Awakening and creator of the Sete Ecos universe. I study the systems that shape us, what we inherit without choosing, and what it allows us to have, in love, in work, in life.
sobre.p2: I'm in training in three postgraduate paths that intersect: transpersonal psychology, psychology and spirituality, and systemic family constellation therapy. They are not three paths. They are one question seen from three places: what shapes us, what binds us, what frees us.
sobre.p3: I don't come to teach what I have. I come to show the path until you are enough on your own. Because what is enough, attracts.

newsletter.lead: If something here touched you, leave an email. I send a letter now and then, when there is something true to say.
newsletter.ok: Thank you. When there is, I'll write.
newsletter.jaEstas: You're already with me. Thank you.

escritos.todosSub: Texts I leave here, when there is something to say.

notFound.lead: The address you wrote leads nowhere — at least, nowhere here.
